creator: johans@FreeBSD.org
text:
Works for me. Can you please provide more details?

$ grep texinfo.tex distinfo
SHA256 (texinfo/5.2.20150101/texinfo.tex) = c73e31295f87d4b856c38bc4d31f7cfc8f0c5605d4ecf58c60e0db276796306b
SIZE (texinfo/5.2.20150101/texinfo.tex) = 328628

$ curl -o- http://ftp.gnu.org/gnu/texinfo/texinfo.tex | sha256
c73e31295f87d4b856c38bc4d31f7cfc8f0c5605d4ecf58c60e0db276796306b
